headline: Bitcoin Faces 6-Month Consolidation Amid Slowing Demand

article.title: Bitcoin’s ‘less aggressive demand’ may lead to months of consolidation: Analysis
article.summary: Bitcoin demand and ETF flows weaken as BTC struggles below $80,000, raising risks of prolonged consolidation or a drop toward $65,000.

headline: Terra UST Plunges 90% Amid Jane Street Allegations

article.title: Jane Street accused of using Terra Telegram backchannel before UST crash
article.summary: The private Telegram backchannel allegedly allowed Jane Street to unwind hundreds of millions in potential exposure “mere hours before” the Terra ecosystem’s $40 billion collapse.

article.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Standoff Boosts Oil, Yields: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A standoff between the US and Iran over key issues lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds on concern that a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz could worsen energy disruptions and fuel inflation.

article.title: Microsoft Is Market’s Biggest Drag as AI Woes Weigh Down Stock
article.summary: The S&P 500 Index has had a fitful 2026 as it aims for a fourth-straight year of double-digit percentage gains, something it hasn’t done since the 1990s, while contending with risks from the war in Iran and rising inflation.

headline: Sell 5% Bitcoin Holdings Now: Corporate Liability Looms

article.summary:

5 Reasons Corporations Should Sell Bitcoin

headline: SpaceX Holds $1.45B Bitcoin Ahead of IPO Filing

article.title: SpaceX Heads Into Historic IPO With a $1.45 Billion Bitcoin Treasury on Its Books
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

SpaceX Heads Into Historic IPO With a $1.45 Billion Bitcoin Treasury on Its Books
SpaceX has filed for a historic IPO, revealing it holds 18,712 BTC worth about $1.45 billion, positioning it among the largest corporate Bitcoin holders as it prepares to list on Nasdaq.
